workflow.name: Organize handwritten memos from LINE using Gemini OCR, Drive and Sheets
workflow.description:
## AI Handwritten Memo Organizer – Overview
This workflow receives handwritten memo images sent via LINE and automatically extracts, summarizes, and organizes the content using AI.

## Step-by-step process:
1.	User sends a handwritten memo image via LINE
2.	Webhook receives the image
3.	Immediate reply is sent: “Processing…”
4.	Image is saved to Google Drive
5.	AI performs OCR and generates structured data (title, category, summary, tags)
6.	The JSON response is safely parsed with error handling
7.	OCR failure is detected if text cannot be properly extracted
If OCR fails:
→ User is notified with guidance for retaking the image
If OCR succeeds:
→ Check if the category sheet exists in Google Sheets
→ If not, create a new sheet
→ Save the data (title, summary, tags, date, image URL)
8.	Completion message is sent to the user via LINE

## Setup Steps
1.	Create a LINE Messaging API channel and obtain the Channel Access Token
2.	Create a Google Spreadsheet for storing memo data
3.	Create a Google Drive folder to store uploaded images
4.	Set the following values in the Config node:
o	LINE_ACCESS_TOKEN
o	GOOGLE_SHEETS_ID
5.	Set the Webhook URL in the LINE Developers Console

parameters.text:
=You are a high-precision OCR engine.

Please read the text written in the image as accurately as possible.
If the text cannot be read, you must output the following JSON and terminate the process:
{
"title": "",
"category": "",
"summary": "The text could not be recognized.",
"tags":[]
}

If the text can be read, generate the following based on the summarized content:

Title

Category

Summary

Tags (up to 3 important keywords)

【Rules】

The category should be a short, easy-to-group term.

Tags must be single words with no duplicates.

Avoid overly abstract tags (e.g., important, memo).

【Important】

Output must be pure JSON only

No explanations or preface text

Do not output anything other than JSON

Output the following fields in JSON format:

{
"title": "",
"category": "",
"summary": "",
"tags":[]
}

parameters.content:
##  Image Handling

Processes the incoming image:

• Downloads image from LINE API
• Uploads image to Google Drive
• Restores binary data

Ensures persistent storage for later use.

## AI Handwritten Memo Organizer – Overview
This workflow receives handwritten memo images sent via LINE and automatically extracts, summarizes, and organizes the content using AI.

## Step-by-step process:
1.	User sends a handwritten memo image via LINE
2.	Webhook receives the image
3.	Immediate reply is sent: “Processing…”
4.	Image is saved to Google Drive
5.	AI performs OCR and generates structured data (title, category, summary, tags)
6.	The JSON response is safely parsed with error handling
7.	OCR failure is detected if text cannot be properly extracted
If OCR fails:
→ User is notified with guidance for retaking the image
If OCR succeeds:
→ Check if the category sheet exists in Google Sheets
→ If not, create a new sheet
→ Save the data (title, summary, tags, date, image URL)
8.	Completion message is sent to the user via LINE

## Setup Steps
1.	Create a LINE Messaging API channel and obtain the Channel Access Token
2.	Create a Google Spreadsheet for storing memo data
3.	Create a Google Drive folder to store uploaded images
4.	Set the following values in the Config node:
o	LINE_ACCESS_TOKEN
o	GOOGLE_SHEETS_ID
5.	Set the Webhook URL in the LINE Developers Console

## Key points:
• Immediate response improves user experience
• JSON parsing includes fallback handling for malformed AI output
• OCR failure is detected and handled safely
• Data is automatically categorized into separate sheets
• Tags are generated to enable future search functionality
 
## Notes:
• If a non-image message is sent, the user is prompted to send an image
• If text cannot be extracted, the data will not be saved
• The AI output may not always be perfectly accurate
• This workflow is designed for memo organization, not critical data processing

## LINE Input & Validation

Receives messages via LINE Webhook.

• Validates that the input is an image
• Non-image messages are rejected with guidance
• Ensures only valid data enters the workflow
• Sends an instant reply: “Processing…”

This step prevents invalid processing early.

##  OCR & AI Processing

Extracts and structures data from the image:

• Performs OCR on handwritten content
• Generates structured JSON:
  - title
  - category
  - summary
  - tags

Transforms unstructured data into usable format.

##  JSON Parsing

Safely parses AI output:

• Removes invalid wrappers (e.g. ```json)
• Extracts JSON content
• Handles malformed responses with fallback

Prevents workflow crashes from AI inconsistencies.

## OCR Failure Detection

Validates OCR result quality:

• Detects missing or invalid summary
• Stops workflow if text is not recognized

Prevents saving incorrect data.

## Sheet Management

Manages Google Sheets structure:

• Checks if category sheet exists
• Creates new sheet if needed

Enables scalable data organization.

## Data Storage

Stores structured data:

• Title
• Summary
• Tags
• Date
• Image URL

All data is appended to the correct sheet.

## Completion Response

Sends results back to user:

• Confirms successful processing
• Provides organized output

Closes the workflow clearly.

user.name: Hiroshi Hashimoto
user.bio:
I studied programming at a vocational school in Japan and obtained the Level 2 Information Technology Engineer certification. After that, I worked as a sales representative at a staffing agency.

In 2021, I opened a private tutoring school, where I serve as the head instructor, supporting elementary, junior high, and high school students with their studies. I also launched a QUREO programming school.

Since 2025, I have been studying n8n and am aiming to become a certified creator.

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
